name: ClickUp
description: Connect Mattermost channels to ClickUp. Create tasks, assign work, get notifications, and due-date reminders.

settings_schema.header: Get your ClickUp credentials from [ClickUp Settings → Apps](https://app.clickup.com/settings/apps). See the plugin README for step-by-step instructions.

settings.help_text: Personal API token starting with pk_. ClickUp → avatar (top-left) → Settings → Apps → API Token → Generate.
Numeric workspace ID from your ClickUp URL: https://app.clickup.com/12345678/... → Team ID is 12345678.
Optional fallback list ID. Open a ClickUp list in the browser — the URL contains /li/901234567890 and 901234567890 is the List ID.
Send Mattermost reminders before tasks are due.
How many hours before the due date to send a reminder.
Secret used to verify ClickUp webhook payloads.
settings.regenerate_help_text: Regenerating invalidates the existing ClickUp webhook. Re-activate the plugin to recreate it.
